generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor, providing high‑resolution rotor positional data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox, providing output shaft angle data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current, streamed via MQTT from the CNC controller."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorData
]

instance AngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Axis angle sensor measuring the output angle of the first rotary axis, streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngleSensorData
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance AngleSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngleSensor
]

instance CurrentTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated motor current trace aligned with simulation models for torque calculation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated torque trace computed from current and encoder data for comparison with simulated values."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, CurrentSensorData, AngleSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated angular velocity trace derived from encoder data and used in model simulation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, AngleSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Matlab/Simulink model of the permanent magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionCoulombModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical white‑box Coulomb friction model integrated into the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical white‑box Stribeck friction model integrated into the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑driven Dahl friction model for friction estimation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑driven LuGre friction model for friction estimation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating live sensor data transport between the physical robot and the Digital Shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink execution environment enabling simulation models and friction estimation."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionIdentificationService, ModelComparisonService, FrictionParameterUpdateService
]

instance SysMLModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML structural model representing motor, gearbox, and friction components, stored in AAS."
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelConsistencyService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell encapsulating models and data for interoperability."
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetIntegrationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard visualizing joint kinematics, friction estimates, and wear trends."
    DTDFVocab:enables OperatorDashboardService
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ingests live sensor data into the Digital Twin via MQTT broker."
    DTDFVocab:provides MQTTConnectivityInsight
]

instance SysMLModelConsistencyService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensures SysML structural model consistency with data and simulations."
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLConsistencyInsight
]

instance AssetIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages Asset Administration Shell for interoperability."
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetIntegrationInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of joint kinematics and friction states on the custom dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeJointKinematicsInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white‑box and black‑box friction models using live data traces."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionEstimationInsight, WearTrendInsight
]

instance ModelComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated versus measured data to validate model fidelity."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelComparisonInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provision of updated friction parameters to the robot controller for tuning."
    DTDFVocab:provides ProvideUpdatedFrictionParametersAction
]

instance MaintenanceSchedulingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic maintenance scheduling based on wear trend insights."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceScheduleAction
]

instance OperatorDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Display of friction estimates and wear trends to operators via the dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeJointKinematicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time joint kinematics and friction visualization."
]

instance FrictionEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction estimates derived from continuous identification."
]

instance WearTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Wear trend trends indicating component degradation."
]

instance ModelComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated vs measured data streams."
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of joint kinematics and wear trends for operator decision support."
]

instance MQTTConnectivityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of MQTT connectivity between physical robot and Digital Twin."
]

instance SysMLConsistencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Consistency of SysML structural model with operational data."
]

instance AssetIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integration status of Asset Administration Shells."
]

instance ProvideUpdatedFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updated friction parameters model ready for controller tuning."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceScheduleAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Maintenance schedule recommendations based on wear trends."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotAxisComponent, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorComponent, GearwheelGearboxComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance RobotAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First rotary axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, comprising motor, gearbox and friction components."
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor driving the first rotary axis."
]

instance GearwheelGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel gearbox translating motor rotation to axis motion."
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing high‑precision motion control in the axis."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow produces friction estimates and torque corrections that can be transmitted back to the CNC controller to adjust motor commands for improved motion accuracy, acting as a feed‑forward compensation source."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation; sensor data are streamed at the native update rate of the robot’s controllers (typically in the millisecond range), enabling on‑line model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical robot and sensors → MQTT broker → Digital Shadow (processing component using AAS‑defined models) → dashboard display; the Twin orchestrates data ingestion, model execution, and user interface."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (ideal modeling of motor and gearbox dynamics), Manufacturing (physical hardware with embedded sensors), and Operation (online data streaming and friction identification during machine usage)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "White‑box analytical friction models provide physics‑based fidelity; black‑box models capture unmodeled dynamics; continuous parameter identification validates models by comparing simulated and measured torque/velocity; uncertainties due to wear, temperature, and load variations are addressed through real‑time adaptation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted via MQTT over TCP/IP on Ethernet; the Digital Shadow subscribes to MQTT topics; Asset Administration Shells expose metadata through a RESTful API; the system relies on standard OPC UA for AAS communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for model definition, Asset Administration Shell (OPC UA) for semantic asset description, MQTT protocol for real‑time data exchange, and Simulink for simulation."
]
